title: 13th Youth Saeima convenes at Latvian parliament
summary_full: On Monday, April 13th, 100 young people from all over Latvia stepped into the shoes of Saeima deputies for a day. The 13th Youth Saeima convened in Parliament – they elected the parliamentary praesidium, and then went to work in four different Saeima committees, Latvian Television reports.
